mnemonics: S.P.I.D.E.R. Webs are Cloudy (Service Models): SaaS (Software), PaaS (Platform), IaaS (Infrastructure), DaaS (Desktop), EaaS (Everything-as-a-Service), RaaS (Recovery)
keyPoints: Scalability allows systems to handle increased load by adding resources.
Virtualization is the fundamental technology that enables cloud computing by abstracting physical hardware.
The shared responsibility model dictates that security is a joint effort between the cloud provider and the consumer.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is solely responsible for all data security (ignoring the shared responsibility model).
Confusing vertical scaling (adding power to a single node) with horizontal scaling (adding more nodes).
